  theorem list_set_flatten {l : List (List α)} {l1 : List α} {elt : α}
    {idx : Nat} {hidx : idx < l.length}  :
    (l.set idx (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten
    = (l.set idx l1).flatten.insertIdx ((List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum + l1.length) elt := by
      have h : ∀ (l : List (List α)) (l1 : List α) (idx : ℕ), idx < l.length →
        (l.set idx (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten = (l.set idx l1).flatten.insertIdx ((List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum + l1.length) elt := by
        intro l
        induction' l with hd tl ih
        · intro l1 idx h
          exfalso
          simp at h
        · intro l1 idx h
          cases' eq_or_ne (idx) 0 with h₀ h₀
          · -- Case: idx = 0
            simp_all [h₀, List.set, List.get?, List.length_cons]
            <;>
            simp_all [List.insertIdx_append, List.take_succ, List.map_cons, List.sum_cons]
            <;>
            ring_nf at * <;>
            (try omega) <;>
            (try
              {
                simp_all [List.map, List.take, List.sum_map, List.length_map]
                <;>
                ring_nf at *
                <;>
                (try omega)
              })
          · -- Case: idx ≠ 0
            have h₁ : idx ≥ 1 := by
              by_contra h₁
              have h₂ : idx = 0 := by omega
              contradiction
            have h₂ : idx = idx.pred + 1 := by
              have h₃ := Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos (by omega : 0 < idx)
              omega
            simp_all [h₂, List.set, List.get?, List.length_cons]
            <;>
            simp_all [List.insertIdx_append, List.take_succ, List.map_cons, List.sum_cons]
            <;>
            (try ring_nf at *) <;>
            (try
              {
                have h₃ := ih _ l1 (idx.pred)
                have h₄ : idx.pred < tl.length := by
                  omega
                simp_all [h₄]
                <;>
                (try
                  {
                    simp_all [List.map, List.take, List.sum_map, List.length_map]
                    <;>
                    ring_nf at *
                    <;>
                    (try omega)
                  })
              }) <;>
            (try omega) <;>
            (try
              {
                simp_all [List.map, List.take, List.sum_map, List.length_map]
                <;>
                ring_nf at *
                <;>
                (try omega)
              })
            <;>
            aesop
      exact h l l1 idx hidx

```lean
  theorem list_set_flatten {l : List (List α)} {l1 : List α} {elt : α}
    {idx : Nat} {hidx : idx < l.length}  :
    (l.set idx (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten
    = (l.set idx l1).flatten.insertIdx ((List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum + l1.length) elt := by
      have h : ∀ (l : List (List α)) (l1 : List α) (idx : ℕ), idx < l.length →
        (l.set idx (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten = (l.set idx l1).flatten.insertIdx ((List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum + l1.length) elt := by
        intro l
        induction' l with hd tl ih
        · intro l1 idx h
          exfalso
          simp at h
        · intro l1 idx h
          cases' idx with idx
          · -- Case: idx = 0
            simp_all [List.set, List.get?, List.length_cons]
            <;>
            simp_all [List.insertIdx_append, List.take_succ, List.map_cons, List.sum_cons]
            <;>
            ring_nf at * <;>
            (try omega) <;>
            (try
              {
                simp_all [List.map, List.take, List.sum_map, List.length_map]
                <;>
                ring_nf at *
                <;>
                (try omega)
              })
          · -- Case: idx = n + 1
            have h₁ := ih _ l1 idx
            have h₂ : idx < tl.length → (tl.set idx (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten = (tl.set idx l1).flatten.insertIdx ((List.take idx (tl.map List.length)).sum + l1.length) elt := by
              intro h₂
              exact h₁ h₂
            have h₃ : (hd :: tl).set (idx + 1) (l1 ++ [elt]) = (hd :: (tl.set idx (l1 ++ [elt]))) := by
              simp [List.set]
              <;>
              (try omega)
              <;>
              (try
                {
                  simp_all [List.get?, List.length_cons]
                  <;>
                  (try omega)
                })
            have h₄ : (hd :: tl).set (idx + 1) l1 = (hd :: (tl.set idx l1)) := by
              simp [List.set]
              <;>
              (try omega)
              <;>
              (try
                {
                  simp_all [List.get?, List.length_cons]
                  <;>
                  (try omega)
                })
            have h₅ : ((hd :: tl).set (idx + 1) (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten = ((hd :: (tl.set idx (l1 ++ [elt])))).flatten := by
              rw [h₃]
            have h₆ : ((hd :: tl).set (idx + 1) l1).flatten = ((hd :: (tl.set idx l1))).flatten := by
              rw [h₄]
            have h₇ : ((hd :: (tl.set idx (l1 ++ [elt])))).flatten = hd ++ (tl.set idx (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten := by
              simp [List.flatten]
            have h₈ : ((hd :: (tl.set idx l1))).flatten = hd ++ (tl.set idx l1).flatten := by
              simp [List.flatten]
            have h₉ : ((hd :: tl).set (idx + 1) (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten = hd ++ (tl.set idx (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten := by
              rw [h₅, h₇]
            have h₁₀ : ((hd :: tl).set (idx + 1) l1).flatten = hd ++ (tl.set idx l1).flatten := by
              rw [h₆, h₈]
            have h₁₁ : (List.take (idx + 1) ((hd :: tl).map List.length)).sum = hd.length + (List.take idx (tl.map List.length)).sum := by
              simp [List.take, List.map]
              <;>
              simp_all [List.sum_range_succ, List.sum_range_zero]
              <;>
              ring_nf
              <;>
              omega
            cases' lt_or_le (idx) (tl.length) with h₁₂ h₁₂
            · -- Case: idx < tl.length
              have h₁₃ := h₁ h₁₂
              simp_all [h₃, h₄, h₅, h₆, h₇, h₈, h₉, h₁₀, h₁₁]
              <;>
              simp_all [List.insertIdx_append, List.take_succ, List.map_cons, List.sum_cons]
              <;>
              (try ring_nf at *) <;>
              (try omega)
            · -- Case: idx ≥ tl.length
              exfalso
              simp_all [List.length]
              <;> omega
      exact h l l1 idx hidx
